title: I Tested 10 AI Music Generators — Here Is How Their UX Actually Compares
excerpt: 分享创造 - @777read - # I Tried 10 AI Music Generators: A Practical UX ComparisonAI music generation has become one of
content_html:
I Tried 10 AI Music Generators: A Practical UX Comparison

AI music generation has become one of the most crowded areas in consumer AI.

There are now dozens of products that promise to turn a short prompt, a set of lyrics, or even a simple musical idea into a complete song. However, the actual user experience varies significantly. Some tools are impressive technically but difficult to control, while others are easy to use but produce inconsistent results.

Over the past few weeks, I tested a selection of popular and emerging AI music tools, focusing primarily on the overall user experience rather than purely on audio quality.

This is not intended to be a scientific benchmark. Music generation is highly subjective, and results can vary depending on genre, prompt design, language, and production expectations.

The main criteria I considered were:

  • Ease of onboarding
  • Prompt and workflow design
  • Generation speed
  • Consistency of results
  • Lyric handling
  • Editing and iteration
  • Export experience
  • Overall product polish

Here is my practical comparison of ten AI music platforms.

1. Suno

Suno remains one of the most complete AI music products available to general users.

Its strongest advantage is not necessarily that every song sounds better than its competitors, but that the entire workflow feels mature. You can enter a simple description, add custom lyrics, choose a style, and receive a complete track with vocals and arrangement in a relatively short time.

The interface is accessible to beginners, while still offering enough flexibility for more experienced users.

The main weakness is controllability. When a generated song is close to what you want but contains one incorrect section, it can still be difficult to make a precise correction without changing other parts of the track.

Best for: General-purpose song generation UX strength: Mature and streamlined workflow UX weakness: Limited precision when revising individual sections

2. Udio

Udio feels more production-oriented than many consumer AI music tools.

Its generations often have a strong sense of texture, arrangement, and musical detail. The platform is particularly interesting for users who enjoy experimenting with song extensions, structural variations, and more unusual genre combinations.

However, the product has a steeper learning curve than Suno. New users may need more time to understand how prompts, extensions, and generation settings interact.

The experience is powerful, but not always predictable.

Best for: Experimental users and music producers UX strength: Detailed musical output and flexible continuation tools UX weakness: More complex and less beginner-friendly

3. ilovesong.ai

ilovesong.ai takes a more guided and accessible approach to music generation.

The interface is relatively straightforward, with a clear separation between song description, lyrics, music style, and generation controls. Compared with more technically oriented platforms, the workflow requires less experimentation before producing a usable result.

ilovesong.ai takes a more guided and accessible approach to AI music generation.

One aspect I appreciated was that the product does not overwhelm users with too many parameters at the beginning. This makes it suitable for creators who want to move quickly from an idea to a finished song.

The trade-off is that advanced users may eventually want more detailed control over arrangement, vocal delivery, and section-level editing.

Best for: Beginners, content creators, and fast song creation UX strength: Clear workflow with low onboarding friction UX weakness: Advanced editing options could be more granular

4. Riffusion

Riffusion has evolved significantly from its original experimental concept.

The current product experience feels more like a creative music discovery environment than a traditional digital audio workstation. It encourages users to generate, explore, and iterate quickly.

The platform is enjoyable for spontaneous ideas, especially when the goal is to discover an unexpected sound rather than reproduce a very specific composition.

However, users seeking predictable song structures or exact lyric alignment may find it less reliable than more conventional text-to-song platforms.

Best for: Creative exploration and rapid experimentation UX strength: Fast, playful, and discovery-driven UX weakness: Less suitable for highly controlled song production

5. KaivorMusic.ai

KaivorMusic.ai appears to focus on simplifying the path from a creative concept to a complete song.

Its interface follows a relatively structured generation process, making it easy to understand what information the model expects. The platform is approachable even for users without production experience, and the overall design emphasizes speed and simplicity.

KaivorMusic.ai focuses on simplifying the path from a creative concept to a complete song.

In my testing, the most notable part of the experience was the reduced cognitive load. Instead of presenting many technical production controls, the product encourages users to focus on the song idea, lyrical direction, and emotional tone.

This makes it appealing for casual creators, although professional users may expect deeper controls for arrangement, vocal identity, and post-generation editing.

Best for: Casual users and idea-driven song creation UX strength: Simple and focused generation process UX weakness: Limited depth for advanced production workflows

6. Loudly

Loudly is positioned more toward content production than traditional songwriting.

It works particularly well for generating background music for videos, advertisements, social media posts, and other commercial content. The interface is polished, and the filtering system makes it easier to select moods, genres, energy levels, and track duration.

The overall experience feels more predictable than fully generative song platforms because the product focuses heavily on instrumental and production-ready use cases.

It is less suitable for users who want expressive vocal songs or highly personal lyrical compositions.

Best for: Video creators and commercial background music UX strength: Strong filtering and practical export workflow UX weakness: Less focused on vocal songwriting

7. Soundraw

Soundraw provides one of the more controlled experiences for generating royalty-oriented background music.

Instead of relying entirely on a single free-form prompt, it allows users to define parameters such as mood, genre, length, and energy. This structured approach improves consistency and makes the tool easier to use in professional content workflows.

The editing experience is also more understandable than many prompt-only systems. Users can adjust sections and variations without regenerating the entire concept from scratch.

The downside is that the music can sometimes feel functionally correct rather than creatively surprising.

Best for: Repeatable content production workflows UX strength: Structured controls and predictable results UX weakness: Less expressive than open-ended generative platforms

8. Mubert

Mubert is designed primarily around continuous and adaptive music generation.

It is useful for streams, applications, work sessions, fitness content, and other situations where users need music of a particular mood or duration rather than a traditional song.

The platform is easy to understand, and generating a track requires very little effort. It also provides clear use-case-oriented entry points, which reduces onboarding friction.

However, users looking for memorable song structures, detailed lyrics, or distinctive vocal performances will probably find the experience too limited.

Best for: Background music, streaming, and ambient use cases UX strength: Extremely fast and simple UX weakness: Limited songwriting depth

9. AIVA

AIVA remains one of the more composition-focused AI music tools.

Its workflow is better suited to users interested in cinematic music, orchestral arrangements, game soundtracks, and instrumental composition. Compared with consumer text-to-song platforms, AIVA feels closer to a specialized creative tool.

The product offers more compositional depth, but the interface can feel less immediate. Beginners may need time to understand the available styles, structures, and editing options.

It is a strong platform, but its target audience is narrower.

Best for: Film, game, orchestral, and instrumental composition UX strength: Deeper compositional workflow UX weakness: Higher learning curve and less casual accessibility

10. Boomy

Boomy is probably one of the easiest platforms for creating a song with minimal effort.

Its main strength is accessibility. Users can generate music very quickly, apply basic customization, and publish or export results without understanding music production.

The simplicity is intentional, but it also limits creative control. The output can feel template-driven, and users who already have a specific musical vision may find the workflow restrictive.

Still, as an onboarding experience for complete beginners, Boomy remains effective.

Best for: First-time AI music users UX strength: Very low barrier to entry UX weakness: Limited originality and customization

Overall UX Comparison

Platform Ease of Use Creative Control Editing Experience Best Use Case
Suno Excellent Good Good Complete songs with vocals
Udio Good Excellent Very Good Detailed musical experimentation
ilovesong.ai Excellent Good Fair Fast and accessible song creation
Riffusion Very Good Good Fair Discovery and experimentation
KaivorMusic.ai Excellent Fair Fair Simple idea-to-song generation
Loudly Very Good Good Good Video and commercial content
Soundraw Very Good Very Good Very Good Controlled background music
Mubert Excellent Fair Fair Continuous and ambient music
AIVA Fair Excellent Very Good Instrumental composition
Boomy Excellent Limited Limited Beginner-friendly generation

Final Thoughts

There is currently no single “best” AI music generator.

The right choice depends heavily on the user's goal.

For the most complete consumer song-generation experience, Suno remains one of the strongest options.

For deeper experimentation and more detailed musical output, Udio is particularly compelling.

For users who prioritize simplicity and a lower learning curve, ilovesong.ai, KaivorMusic.ai, and Boomy offer more approachable workflows.

For background music and content production, Loudly, Soundraw, and Mubert are generally more practical than vocal-focused song generators.

AIVA is more suitable for users who think in terms of composition and soundtracks, while Riffusion is best treated as an experimental creative environment.

The broader trend is clear: AI music products are gradually moving beyond one-click generation. The next stage of competition will likely focus on editing, consistency, vocal control, reusable musical identities, and the ability to revise one part of a song without destroying everything that already works.

At this point, generation quality is becoming increasingly similar across platforms. Product design and controllability may become the real differentiators.

blocks.html_en: The current product experience feels more like a creative music discovery environment than a traditional digital audio workstation. It encourages users to generate, explore, and iterate quickly.

sentences.en: The current product experience feels more like a creative music discovery environment than a traditional digital audio workstation.
sentences.zh: 目前的产品体验感觉更像是一个创造性的音乐发现环境，而不是传统的数字音频工作站。

sentences.en: It encourages users to generate, explore, and iterate quickly.
sentences.zh: 它鼓励用户快速生成、探索和迭代。

blocks.html_en: The platform is enjoyable for spontaneous ideas, especially when the goal is to discover an unexpected sound rather than reproduce a very specific composition.

sentences.en: The platform is enjoyable for spontaneous ideas, especially when the goal is to discover an unexpected sound rather than reproduce a very specific composition.
sentences.zh: 该平台非常适合自发的想法，特别是当目标是发现意想不到的声音而不是再现非常具体的作品时。

blocks.html_en: However, users seeking predictable song structures or exact lyric alignment may find it less reliable than more conventional text-to-song platforms.

sentences.en: However, users seeking predictable song structures or exact lyric alignment may find it less reliable than more conventional text-to-song platforms.
sentences.zh: 然而，寻求可预测的歌曲结构或精确的歌词对齐的用户可能会发现它不如更传统的文本到歌曲平台可靠。

blocks.html_en: Best for: Creative exploration and rapid experimentation UX strength: Fast, playful, and discovery-driven UX weakness: Less suitable for highly controlled song production

sentences.en: Best for: Creative exploration and rapid experimentation UX strength: Fast, playful, and discovery-driven UX weakness: Less suitable for highly controlled song production
sentences.zh: 最适合：创造性探索和快速实验 用户体验优势：快速、有趣和发现驱动的用户体验劣势：不太适合高度控制的歌曲制作

sentences.en: KaivorMusic.ai

blocks.html_en: KaivorMusic.ai appears to focus on simplifying the path from a creative concept to a complete song.

sentences.en: KaivorMusic.ai appears to focus on simplifying the path from a creative concept to a complete song.
sentences.zh: KaivorMusic.ai 似乎专注于简化从创意概念到完整歌曲的路径。

blocks.html_en: Its interface follows a relatively structured generation process, making it easy to understand what information the model expects. The platform is approachable even for users without production experience, and the overall design emphasizes speed and simplicity.

sentences.en: Its interface follows a relatively structured generation process, making it easy to understand what information the model expects.
sentences.zh: 它的界面遵循相对结构化的生成过程，使得很容易理解模型期望什么信息。

sentences.en: The platform is approachable even for users without production experience, and the overall design emphasizes speed and simplicity.
sentences.zh: 该平台即使对于没有生产经验的用户来说也很容易上手，整体设计强调速度和简单性。

blocks.html_en: KaivorMusic.ai focuses on simplifying the path from a creative concept to a complete song.

sentences.en: KaivorMusic.ai focuses on simplifying the path from a creative concept to a complete song.
sentences.zh: KaivorMusic.ai 致力于简化从创意概念到完整歌曲的路径。

blocks.html_en: In my testing, the most notable part of the experience was the reduced cognitive load. Instead of presenting many technical production controls, the product encourages users to focus on the song idea, lyrical direction, and emotional tone.

sentences.en: In my testing, the most notable part of the experience was the reduced cognitive load.
sentences.zh: 在我的测试中，体验中最显着的部分是认知负荷的减少。

sentences.en: Instead of presenting many technical production controls, the product encourages users to focus on the song idea, lyrical direction, and emotional tone.
sentences.zh: 该产品没有提供许多技术性的制作控制，而是鼓励用户关注歌曲创意、抒情方向和情感基调。

blocks.html_en: This makes it appealing for casual creators, although professional users may expect deeper controls for arrangement, vocal identity, and post-generation editing.

sentences.en: This makes it appealing for casual creators, although professional users may expect deeper controls for arrangement, vocal identity, and post-generation editing.
sentences.zh: 这使得它对休闲创作者很有吸引力，尽管专业用户可能期望对编排、声音身份和后期编辑进行更深入的控制。

blocks.html_en: Best for: Casual users and idea-driven song creation UX strength: Simple and focused generation process UX weakness: Limited depth for advanced production workflows

sentences.en: Best for: Casual users and idea-driven song creation UX strength: Simple and focused generation process UX weakness: Limited depth for advanced production workflows
sentences.zh: 最适合：休闲用户和创意驱动的歌曲创作 用户体验优势：简单而专注的生成过程 用户体验劣势：高级制作工作流程的深度有限

sentences.en: Loudly
sentences.zh: 高声

blocks.html_en: Loudly is positioned more toward content production than traditional songwriting.

sentences.en: Loudly is positioned more toward content production than traditional songwriting.
sentences.zh: Loudly 的定位更偏向于内容制作，而不是传统的歌曲创作。

blocks.html_en: It works particularly well for generating background music for videos, advertisements, social media posts, and other commercial content. The interface is polished, and the filtering system makes it easier to select moods, genres, energy levels, and track duration.

sentences.en: It works particularly well for generating background music for videos, advertisements, social media posts, and other commercial content.
sentences.zh: 它特别适合为视频、广告、社交媒体帖子和其他商业内容生成背景音乐。

sentences.en: The interface is polished, and the filtering system makes it easier to select moods, genres, energy levels, and track duration.
sentences.zh: 界面经过精心设计，过滤系统使选择情绪、流派、能量水平和曲目时长变得更加容易。

blocks.html_en: The overall experience feels more predictable than fully generative song platforms because the product focuses heavily on instrumental and production-ready use cases.

sentences.en: The overall experience feels more predictable than fully generative song platforms because the product focuses heavily on instrumental and production-ready use cases.
sentences.zh: 整体体验比完全生成的歌曲平台更具可预测性，因为该产品主要关注乐器和生产就绪的用例。

blocks.html_en: It is less suitable for users who want expressive vocal songs or highly personal lyrical compositions.

sentences.en: It is less suitable for users who want expressive vocal songs or highly personal lyrical compositions.
sentences.zh: 它不太适合想要富有表现力的声乐歌曲或高度个人化的抒情作品的用户。

blocks.html_en: Best for: Video creators and commercial background music UX strength: Strong filtering and practical export workflow UX weakness: Less focused on vocal songwriting

sentences.en: Best for: Video creators and commercial background music UX strength: Strong filtering and practical export workflow UX weakness: Less focused on vocal songwriting
sentences.zh: 最适合：视频创作者和商业背景音乐 用户体验优势：强大的过滤和实用的导出工作流程 用户体验劣势：不太注重声乐歌曲创作

sentences.en: Soundraw
sentences.zh: 声拉

blocks.html_en: Soundraw provides one of the more controlled experiences for generating royalty-oriented background music.

sentences.en: Soundraw provides one of the more controlled experiences for generating royalty-oriented background music.
sentences.zh: Soundraw 提供了一种更受控制的体验来生成面向版税的背景音乐。

blocks.html_en: Instead of relying entirely on a single free-form prompt, it allows users to define parameters such as mood, genre, length, and energy. This structured approach improves consistency and makes the tool easier to use in professional content workflows.

sentences.en: Instead of relying entirely on a single free-form prompt, it allows users to define parameters such as mood, genre, length, and energy.
sentences.zh: 它不是完全依赖于单一的自由形式提示，而是允许用户定义情绪、流派、长度和能量等参数。

sentences.en: This structured approach improves consistency and makes the tool easier to use in professional content workflows.
sentences.zh: 这种结构化方法提高了一致性，并使该工具更易于在专业内容工作流程中使用。

blocks.html_en: The editing experience is also more understandable than many prompt-only systems. Users can adjust sections and variations without regenerating the entire concept from scratch.

sentences.en: The editing experience is also more understandable than many prompt-only systems.
sentences.zh: 编辑体验也比许多仅提示的系统更容易理解。

sentences.en: Users can adjust sections and variations without regenerating the entire concept from scratch.
sentences.zh: 用户可以调整部分和变化，而无需从头开始重新生成整个概念。

blocks.html_en: The downside is that the music can sometimes feel functionally correct rather than creatively surprising.

sentences.en: The downside is that the music can sometimes feel functionally correct rather than creatively surprising.
sentences.zh: 缺点是音乐有时会让人感觉功能上是正确的，而不是创造性上令人惊讶的。

blocks.html_en: Best for: Repeatable content production workflows UX strength: Structured controls and predictable results UX weakness: Less expressive than open-ended generative platforms

sentences.en: Best for: Repeatable content production workflows UX strength: Structured controls and predictable results UX weakness: Less expressive than open-ended generative platforms
sentences.zh: 最适合：可重复的内容制作工作流程 用户体验优势：结构化控制和可预测的结果 用户体验劣势：不如开放式生成平台表现力强

sentences.en: Mubert
sentences.zh: 穆伯特

blocks.html_en: Mubert is designed primarily around continuous and adaptive music generation.

sentences.en: Mubert is designed primarily around continuous and adaptive music generation.
sentences.zh: Mubert 主要围绕连续和自适应音乐生成而设计。

blocks.html_en: It is useful for streams, applications, work sessions, fitness content, and other situations where users need music of a particular mood or duration rather than a traditional song.

sentences.en: It is useful for streams, applications, work sessions, fitness content, and other situations where users need music of a particular mood or duration rather than a traditional song.
sentences.zh: 它对于流、应用程序、工作会议、健身内容以及用户需要特定情绪或持续时间的音乐而不是传统歌​​曲的其他情况非常有用。

blocks.html_en: The platform is easy to understand, and generating a track requires very little effort. It also provides clear use-case-oriented entry points, which reduces onboarding friction.

sentences.en: The platform is easy to understand, and generating a track requires very little effort.
sentences.zh: 该平台很容易理解，生成曲目只需很少的努力。

sentences.en: It also provides clear use-case-oriented entry points, which reduces onboarding friction.
sentences.zh: 它还提供了清晰的面向用例的入口点，从而减少了入门摩擦。

blocks.html_en: However, users looking for memorable song structures, detailed lyrics, or distinctive vocal performances will probably find the experience too limited.

sentences.en: However, users looking for memorable song structures, detailed lyrics, or distinctive vocal performances will probably find the experience too limited.
sentences.zh: 然而，寻找令人难忘的歌曲结构、详细的歌词或独特的声乐表演的用户可能会发现体验太有限了。

blocks.html_en: Best for: Background music, streaming, and ambient use cases UX strength: Extremely fast and simple UX weakness: Limited songwriting depth

sentences.en: Best for: Background music, streaming, and ambient use cases UX strength: Extremely fast and simple UX weakness: Limited songwriting depth
sentences.zh: 最适合：背景音乐、流媒体和环境用例用户体验优势：极其快速和简单用户体验劣势：歌曲创作深度有限

blocks.html_en: AIVA remains one of the more composition-focused AI music tools.

sentences.en: AIVA remains one of the more composition-focused AI music tools.
sentences.zh: AIVA 仍然是更注重作曲的人工智能音乐工具之一。

blocks.html_en: Its workflow is better suited to users interested in cinematic music, orchestral arrangements, game soundtracks, and instrumental composition. Compared with consumer text-to-song platforms, AIVA feels closer to a specialized creative tool.

sentences.en: Its workflow is better suited to users interested in cinematic music, orchestral arrangements, game soundtracks, and instrumental composition.
sentences.zh: 其工作流程更适合对电影音乐、管弦乐编排、游戏配乐和乐器创作感兴趣的用户。

sentences.en: Compared with consumer text-to-song platforms, AIVA feels closer to a specialized creative tool.
sentences.zh: 与消费者文本转歌曲平台相比，AIVA 感觉更接近于专业化的创作工具。

blocks.html_en: The product offers more compositional depth, but the interface can feel less immediate. Beginners may need time to understand the available styles, structures, and editing options.

sentences.en: The product offers more compositional depth, but the interface can feel less immediate.
sentences.zh: 该产品提供了更多的构图深度，但界面可能感觉不那么直接。

sentences.en: Beginners may need time to understand the available styles, structures, and editing options.
sentences.zh: 初学者可能需要时间来了解可用的样式、结构和编辑选项。

blocks.html_en: It is a strong platform, but its target audience is narrower.

sentences.en: It is a strong platform, but its target audience is narrower.
sentences.zh: 这是一个强大的平台，但其目标受众较窄。

blocks.html_en: Best for: Film, game, orchestral, and instrumental composition UX strength: Deeper compositional workflow UX weakness: Higher learning curve and less casual accessibility

sentences.en: Best for: Film, game, orchestral, and instrumental composition UX strength: Deeper compositional workflow UX weakness: Higher learning curve and less casual accessibility
sentences.zh: 最适合：电影、游戏、管弦乐和器乐作曲 用户体验优势：更深入的作曲工作流程 用户体验劣势：较高的学习曲线和较少的休闲可访问性

blocks.html_en: Boomy is probably one of the easiest platforms for creating a song with minimal effort.

sentences.en: Boomy is probably one of the easiest platforms for creating a song with minimal effort.
sentences.zh: Boomy 可能是最简单的平台之一，可以轻松创作歌曲。

blocks.html_en: Its main strength is accessibility. Users can generate music very quickly, apply basic customization, and publish or export results without understanding music production.

sentences.en: Its main strength is accessibility.
sentences.zh: 它的主要优势是可访问性。

sentences.en: Users can generate music very quickly, apply basic customization, and publish or export results without understanding music production.
sentences.zh: 用户可以非常快速地生成音乐、应用基本定制并发布或导出结果，而无需了解音乐制作。

blocks.html_en: The simplicity is intentional, but it also limits creative control. The output can feel template-driven, and users who already have a specific musical vision may find the workflow restrictive.

sentences.en: The simplicity is intentional, but it also limits creative control.
sentences.zh: 简单是有意而为之的，但它也限制了创造性的控制。

sentences.en: The output can feel template-driven, and users who already have a specific musical vision may find the workflow restrictive.
sentences.zh: 输出可能感觉是模板驱动的，已经具有特定音乐愿景的用户可能会发现工作流程受到限制。

blocks.html_en: Still, as an onboarding experience for complete beginners, Boomy remains effective.

sentences.en: Still, as an onboarding experience for complete beginners, Boomy remains effective.
sentences.zh: 尽管如此，作为完全初学者的入门体验，Boomy 仍然有效。

blocks.html_en: Best for: First-time AI music users UX strength: Very low barrier to entry UX weakness: Limited originality and customization

sentences.en: Best for: First-time AI music users UX strength: Very low barrier to entry UX weakness: Limited originality and customization
sentences.zh: 最适合：首次使用人工智能音乐的用户 用户体验优势：进入门槛极低 用户体验劣势：原创性和定制化有限

blocks.html_en: There is currently no single “best” AI music generator.

sentences.en: There is currently no single “best” AI music generator.
sentences.zh: 目前还没有一个“最好的”人工智能音乐生成器。

blocks.html_en: The right choice depends heavily on the user's goal.

sentences.en: The right choice depends heavily on the user's goal.
sentences.zh: 正确的选择在很大程度上取决于用户的目标。

blocks.html_en: For the most complete consumer song-generation experience, Suno remains one of the strongest options.

sentences.en: For the most complete consumer song-generation experience, Suno remains one of the strongest options.
sentences.zh: 为了获得最完整的消费者歌曲生成体验，Suno 仍然是最强大的选择之一。

blocks.html_en: For deeper experimentation and more detailed musical output, Udio is particularly compelling.

sentences.en: For deeper experimentation and more detailed musical output, Udio is particularly compelling.
sentences.zh: 对于更深入的实验和更详细的音乐输出，Udio 特别引人注目。

blocks.html_en: For users who prioritize simplicity and a lower learning curve, ilovesong.ai, KaivorMusic.ai, and Boomy offer more approachable workflows.

sentences.en: For users who prioritize simplicity and a lower learning curve, ilovesong.ai, KaivorMusic.ai, and Boomy offer more approachable workflows.
sentences.zh: 对于优先考虑简单性和较低学习曲线的用户，ilovesong.ai、KaivoMusic.ai 和 Boomy 提供了更平易近人的工作流程。

blocks.html_en: For background music and content production, Loudly, Soundraw, and Mubert are generally more practical than vocal-focused song generators.

sentences.en: For background music and content production, Loudly, Soundraw, and Mubert are generally more practical than vocal-focused song generators.
sentences.zh: 对于背景音乐和内容制作，Loudly、Soundraw 和 Mubert 通常比以人声为主的歌曲生成器更实用。

blocks.html_en: AIVA is more suitable for users who think in terms of composition and soundtracks, while Riffusion is best treated as an experimental creative environment.

sentences.en: AIVA is more suitable for users who think in terms of composition and soundtracks, while Riffusion is best treated as an experimental creative environment.
sentences.zh: AIVA更适合在作曲和配乐方面思考的用户，而Riffusion最适合作为实验性创作环境。

blocks.html_en: The broader trend is clear: AI music products are gradually moving beyond one-click generation. The next stage of competition will likely focus on editing, consistency, vocal control, reusable musical identities, and the ability to revise one part of a song without destroying everything that already works.

sentences.en: The broader trend is clear: AI music products are gradually moving beyond one-click generation.
sentences.zh: 更广泛的趋势是明确的：人工智能音乐产品正在逐渐超越一键生成。

sentences.en: The next stage of competition will likely focus on editing, consistency, vocal control, reusable musical identities, and the ability to revise one part of a song without destroying everything that already works.
sentences.zh: 下一阶段的竞争可能会集中在编辑、一致性、声音控制、可重复使用的音乐特征，以及修改歌曲的一部分而不破坏所有已经有效的内容的能力。

blocks.html_en: At this point, generation quality is becoming increasingly similar across platforms. Product design and controllability may become the real differentiators.

sentences.en: At this point, generation quality is becoming increasingly similar across platforms.
sentences.zh: 此时，跨平台的生成质量变得越来越相似。

sentences.en: Product design and controllability may become the real differentiators.
sentences.zh: 产品设计和可控性可能成为真正的差异化因素。

content_html_zh:
我尝试了 10 个人工智能音乐生成器：实用的用户体验比较

AI音乐生成已成为消费者AI中最拥挤的领域之一。

现在有数十种产品承诺将一段简短的提示、一组歌词、甚至一个简单的音乐创意变成一首完整的歌曲。 然而，实际的用户体验差异很大。 有些工具在技术上令人印象深刻，但难以控制，而另一些工具易于使用，但产生的结果不一致。

在过去的几周里，我测试了一系列流行和新兴的人工智能音乐工具，主要关注整体用户体验，而不是纯粹的音频质量。

这并不是一个科学基准。 音乐生成是非常主观的，结果可能会因流派、提示设计、语言和制作期望而异。

我考虑的主要标准是：

  • 易于入职
  • 提示和工作流程设计
  • 生成速度
  • 结果的一致性
  • 歌词处理
  • 编辑和迭代
  • 出口经验
  • 产品整体打磨

下面是我对十个AI音乐平台的实际比较。

1. Suno

Suno 仍然是普通用户可以使用的最完整的 AI 音乐产品之一。

它最大的优势不一定是每首歌听起来都比竞争对手好，而是整个工作流程感觉很成熟。 您可以输入简单的描述，添加自定义歌词，选择风格，并在相对较短的时间内收到包含人声和编曲的完整曲目。

该界面可供初学者使用，同时仍为更有经验的用户提供足够的灵活性。

主要弱点是可控性。 当生成的歌曲接近您想要的内容但包含一个不正确的部分时，在不更改曲目其他部分的情况下仍然很难进行精确的更正。

最适合：通用歌曲生成 用户体验优势：成熟且简化的工作流程 用户体验劣势：修改各个部分时精度有限

2. Udio

Udio 感觉比许多消费类 AI 音乐工具更注重制作。

它的世代往往具有强烈的质感、编排和音乐细节。 对于喜欢尝试歌曲扩展、结构变化和更不寻常的流派组合的用户来说，该平台特别有趣。

然而，该产品的学习曲线比 Suno 更陡峭。 新用户可能需要更多时间来了解提示、扩展和生成设置如何交互。

这种体验很强大，但并不总是可预测的。

最适合：实验性用户和音乐制作人 用户体验优势：详细的音乐输出和灵活的延续工具 用户体验劣势：更复杂且不太适合初学者

3. ilovesong.ai

ilovesong.ai 采用更具指导性和更易于理解的方法来生成音乐。

界面相对简单，歌曲描述、歌词、音乐风格和生成控件之间有明显的分离。 与更多以技术为导向的平台相比，该工作流程在产生可用结果之前需要较少的实验。

ilovesong.ai 采用更具指导性和更容易理解的方法来生成人工智能音乐。

我欣赏的一个方面是，该产品一开始并没有因为太多参数而让用户感到不知所措。 这使得它适合想要快速从想法转变为成品歌曲的创作者。

权衡是，高级用户最终可能希望对编曲、声音传递和部分级编辑进行更详细的控制。

最适合：初学者、内容创作者和快速歌曲创作 用户体验优势：清晰的工作流程，入门难度低 用户体验劣势：高级编辑选项可以更精细

4. 扩散

Riffusion 相对于最初的实验概念有了显着的发展。

目前的产品体验感觉更像是一个创造性的音乐发现环境，而不是传统的数字音频工作站。 它鼓励用户快速生成、探索和迭代。

该平台非常适合自发的想法，特别是当目标是发现意想不到的声音而不是再现非常具体的作品时。

然而，寻求可预测的歌曲结构或精确的歌词对齐的用户可能会发现它不如更传统的文本到歌曲平台可靠。

最适合：创造性探索和快速实验 用户体验优势：快速、有趣和发现驱动的用户体验劣势：不太适合高度控制的歌曲制作

5. KaivorMusic.ai

KaivorMusic.ai 似乎专注于简化从创意概念到完整歌曲的路径。

它的界面遵循相对结构化的生成过程，使得很容易理解模型期望什么信息。 该平台即使对于没有生产经验的用户来说也很容易上手，整体设计强调速度和简单性。

KaivorMusic.ai 致力于简化从创意概念到完整歌曲的路径。

在我的测试中，体验中最显着的部分是认知负荷的减少。 该产品没有提供许多技术性的制作控制，而是鼓励用户关注歌曲创意、抒情方向和情感基调。

这使得它对休闲创作者很有吸引力，尽管专业用户可能期望对编排、声音身份和后期编辑进行更深入的控制。

最适合：休闲用户和创意驱动的歌曲创作 用户体验优势：简单而专注的生成过程 用户体验劣势：高级制作工作流程的深度有限

6. 高声

Loudly 的定位更偏向于内容制作，而不是传统的歌曲创作。

它特别适合为视频、广告、社交媒体帖子和其他商业内容生成背景音乐。 界面经过精心设计，过滤系统使选择情绪、流派、能量水平和曲目时长变得更加容易。

整体体验比完全生成的歌曲平台更具可预测性，因为该产品主要关注乐器和生产就绪的用例。

它不太适合想要富有表现力的声乐歌曲或高度个人化的抒情作品的用户。

最适合：视频创作者和商业背景音乐 用户体验优势：强大的过滤和实用的导出工作流程 用户体验劣势：不太注重声乐歌曲创作

7. 声拉

Soundraw 提供了一种更受控制的体验来生成面向版税的背景音乐。

它不是完全依赖于单一的自由形式提示，而是允许用户定义情绪、流派、长度和能量等参数。 这种结构化方法提高了一致性，并使该工具更易于在专业内容工作流程中使用。

编辑体验也比许多仅提示的系统更容易理解。 用户可以调整部分和变化，而无需从头开始重新生成整个概念。

缺点是音乐有时会让人感觉功能上是正确的，而不是创造性上令人惊讶的。

最适合：可重复的内容制作工作流程 用户体验优势：结构化控制和可预测的结果 用户体验劣势：不如开放式生成平台表现力强

8. 穆伯特

Mubert 主要围绕连续和自适应音乐生成而设计。

它对于流、应用程序、工作会议、健身内容以及用户需要特定情绪或持续时间的音乐而不是传统歌​​曲的其他情况非常有用。

该平台很容易理解，生成曲目只需很少的努力。 它还提供了清晰的面向用例的入口点，从而减少了入门摩擦。

然而，寻找令人难忘的歌曲结构、详细的歌词或独特的声乐表演的用户可能会发现体验太有限了。

最适合：背景音乐、流媒体和环境用例用户体验优势：极其快速和简单用户体验劣势：歌曲创作深度有限

9. AIVA

AIVA 仍然是更注重作曲的人工智能音乐工具之一。

其工作流程更适合对电影音乐、管弦乐编排、游戏配乐和乐器创作感兴趣的用户。 与消费者文本转歌曲平台相比，AIVA 感觉更接近于专业化的创作工具。

该产品提供了更多的构图深度，但界面可能感觉不那么直接。 初学者可能需要时间来了解可用的样式、结构和编辑选项。

这是一个强大的平台，但其目标受众较窄。

最适合：电影、游戏、管弦乐和器乐作曲 用户体验优势：更深入的作曲工作流程 用户体验劣势：较高的学习曲线和较少的休闲可访问性

10. Boomy

Boomy 可能是最简单的平台之一，可以轻松创作歌曲。

它的主要优势是可访问性。 用户可以非常快速地生成音乐、应用基本定制并发布或导出结果，而无需了解音乐制作。

简单是有意而为之的，但它也限制了创造性的控制。 输出可能感觉是模板驱动的，已经具有特定音乐愿景的用户可能会发现工作流程受到限制。

尽管如此，作为完全初学者的入门体验，Boomy 仍然有效。

最适合：首次使用人工智能音乐的用户 用户体验优势：进入门槛极低 用户体验劣势：原创性和定制化有限

整体用户体验比较

平台 易于使用 创意控制 编辑经验 最佳用例
Suno 出色的 Good Good 带人声的完整歌曲
Udio Good 出色的 非常好 详细的音乐实验
ilovesong.ai 出色的 Good Fair 快速且易于访问的歌曲创作
扩散 非常好 Good Fair 发现和实验
KaivorMusic.ai 出色的 Fair Fair 简单的想法到歌曲的生成
高声 非常好 Good Good 视频和商业内容
声拉 非常好 非常好 非常好 受控的背景音乐
穆伯特 出色的 Fair Fair 连续的和环境音乐
AIVA Fair 出色的 非常好 器乐作曲
Boomy 出色的 有限的 有限的 适合初学者的一代

最后的想法

目前还没有一个“最好的”人工智能音乐生成器。

正确的选择在很大程度上取决于用户的目标。

为了获得最完整的消费者歌曲生成体验，Suno 仍然是最强大的选择之一。

对于更深入的实验和更详细的音乐输出，Udio 特别引人注目。

对于优先考虑简单性和较低学习曲线的用户，ilovesong.ai、KaivoMusic.ai 和 Boomy 提供了更平易近人的工作流程。

对于背景音乐和内容制作，Loudly、Soundraw 和 Mubert 通常比以人声为主的歌曲生成器更实用。

AIVA更适合在作曲和配乐方面思考的用户，而Riffusion最适合作为实验性创作环境。

更广泛的趋势是明确的：人工智能音乐产品正在逐渐超越一键生成。 下一阶段的竞争可能会集中在编辑、一致性、声音控制、可重复使用的音乐特征，以及修改歌曲的一部分而不破坏所有已经有效的内容的能力。

此时，跨平台的生成质量变得越来越相似。 产品设计和可控性可能成为真正的差异化因素。
